name: Shenanigans
short_description: Shenanigans is a chaotic party board game for you and your friends, where anyone and anything can change the course of the game at will. Don't let pesky rules stop you from winning. Just change them in your favor!
detailed_description:
How to play: Check out the Gameplay Fundamentals Guide in the Community Hub!

Are you tired of losing board games because those damn rules get in your way? You don't have to be! Unleash the Shenanigans and change the rules of the game in your favor. Combine arbitrary events and actions to create new rules or simply remove the ones you don't like! Set up traps for your opponents and try to secure your victory by all means. Or just make it your mission to cause total chaos! After all, there are no rules.

Features

  • Collect and play cards to perform actions, or add, modify or remove rules to change the gameplay in your favor.

  • Spice up the game with emotes, explosion and spark effects, and draw around on the board.

  • Customize the game to your liking with fully customizable settings, card decks and characters.

  • Destroy your friendship in chaotic games of up to 8 players or play against NPCs.
